meaning: n.烟斗石(指印第安人用以刻制烟斗的粉红色或粉红夹白色的泥质岩)
examples: Pipestone is selling some of its sows.
It is hard to believe that the 2005 Pipestone fishing trip is now history!
The Pipestone system is an alliance system developed by the Pipestone Veterinary Clinic, Minnesota, USA.
The Frankfield East deposit is located near Timmins, Ontario in the Porcupine mining district, also known as the Pipestone property.
